# UiHost.DialectSender enumeration

The originator/direction of a dialect message, per the §26.6 "Sender" column.

```csharp
public enum DialectSender
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| UiToHost | `0` | UI → Host. |
| HostToUi | `1` | Host → UI. |
| UiOrHost | `2` | Either direction (UI ↔ Host). |
| SandboxToHost | `3` | Sandbox → Host (host-internal). |
| HostToSandbox | `4` | Host → Sandbox (host-internal). |
